reason: BTC and ETH are mandatory. Rule thresholds must be defensible on the mandatory core before SOL or XRP may contribute.
optional_asset_policy: After a core-stable rule is frozen, apply the identical rule to SOL and XRP. Their admission is re-decided each WFO quarter from past expanding and recent evidence only.

exact_replay.selection_metrics: all development and validation gates are calculated after exact global one-slot replay on BTC and ETH
exact_replay.same_decision_tie_break: highest threshold-normalized event strength, then BTC before ETH
exact_replay.pending_and_open: decision reserves the slot; no other candidate can enter until slot_free_time

stable_neighborhood.passing_rule: meets every deterministic development and validation gate
stable_neighborhood.stable_rule: passing rule with at least one passing adjacent predeclared threshold configuration
stable_neighborhood.execution_geometry: canonical geometry is used for threshold selection; the 27-point execution neighborhood is a post-selection robustness test and cannot rescue a failed threshold rule
